    Portal: Star Formation & the Interstellar Medium

    An organized entry point to articles about molecular clouds, the ISM, magnetic fields, and the physical processes that govern how stars and clusters form.

    Interstellar Medium

    • Interstellar Medium — Phases and properties of gas and dust
    • Molecular Cloud — Cold, dense star-forming reservoirs
    • Infrared Dark Clouds (IRDCs) — Cold, dense filamentary precursors
    • Interstellar Dust — Grain composition and effects
    • Column Density — Line-of-sight mass tracer
    • Turbulence — Supersonic ISM turbulence

    Star Formation Physics

    • Star Formation — Overview of the star formation process
    • Filamentary Star Formation — Stars forming along filaments
    • Gravitational Collapse — Onset of star-forming cores
    • Jeans Equation — Gravitational stability criterion
    • Stellar Feedback — Supernovae and winds regulating star formation

    Star Clusters & Structure

    • Star Cluster Formation — Dense stellar system assembly
    • Fractal Structure of Star Clusters — Hierarchical spatial distributions
    • Q Parameter — Quantifying stellar clustering vs. fractality
    • Minimum Spanning Tree — Graph-based cluster structure analysis

    Magnetic Fields

    • Magnetic Fields — Role in ISM support and star formation
    • Magnetic Fields in Star Formation — Field-cloud coupling
    • Mass-to-Flux Ratio — Magnetic criticality of clouds
    • Hourglass Magnetic Field — Pinched field morphology in cores
    • Magnetohydrodynamics — MHD description of magnetized gas

    Observations & Methods

    • Dust Polarimetry — Tracing magnetic field orientation
    • Davis-Chandrasekhar-Fermi Method — Estimating field strength from polarization
    • Polarimetry — Broad overview of polarization measurement
    • ATLASGAL Survey — Galactic plane submm dust survey
    • SOFIA / HAWC+ — Far-infrared polarimetry instrument

    Turbulence & Transport

    • Turbulence & Diffusion Regimes — Transport in magnetized media
    • Shock Waves — Shocks in the ISM and protostellar jets
    • Diffusive Shock Acceleration — Cosmic ray acceleration

    Recent Papers

    • Akhmetali et al. (2026) — Evolution of fractality in centrally concentrated young star clusters
    • Jadhav et al. (2025) — Hourglass magnetic field morphology in IRDC G351.77-0.53
